Notice And Motion To Dismissal Pltf'S Complaint For Failure To Obey This Court'S Prior Order
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Prevailing party to submit form of order. DEFENDANTS DORIS DELEON and APOLONARIO DELEON's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint For Failure To Obey This Court's Prior Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court does not find that additional orders would result in compliance. The court orders entry of judgment for Defendant. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Ptlf'S Attendance And Testimony At Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS DORIS DELEON and APOLONARIO DELEON's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Rocio Guzman's Attendance And Testimony At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for her deposition, to be noticed by Defendant, and to complete that deposition no later than February 26, 2010. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewllett. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Dawn L. Hassell of the Hassell Law Group, Motion to be relieved as counsel for Plaintiff Rocio Guzman, and individual, and as guardian ad litem for Santiago Maldonade, a minor. Appearances: Grace M. Ho, Esq. of The Hassell Law Group (415) 334-4111, appearing for moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
